metadata.intro: Welcome to the Quantum Physics gateway. This roadmap connects the foundational principles of the field to its modern mathematical frontiers.

pillars.title: Foundational Principles
pillars.narrative: Core axioms and historical developments that define the field.

pillars.title: Analytical Framework
pillars.narrative: Detailed mathematical explorations and rigorous derivations.

pillars.title: Modern Frontiers
pillars.narrative: Advanced topics in differential geometry, topology, and unified field theories.
